summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Glimmer Quest Match-3 puzzle game. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend successfully renamed and most features working, but modal overlay issues persist.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay still intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on buttons inside modals (achievements modal close button, shop modal interactions)
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work but normal user interaction fails

passed_tests: Backend: All 15 API endpoints working (100% success)
Frontend: Game successfully renamed to 'GLIMMER QUEST'
Frontend: Main menu shows all 4 buttons (Shop, Daily, Awards, Ranks)
Frontend: Achievements modal displays with 8 achievement types
Frontend: Game board renders with correct 8x8 grid (64 gem cells)
Frontend: Sound toggle button in HUD works correctly
Frontend: Power-ups display and count correctly (Hammer: 3, Shuffle: 2, Color Bomb: 1)
Frontend: All HUD elements present (Lives, Coins, Score)
Frontend: Watch Ad buttons in shop work (simulated)
Frontend: Player creation and game start/end flow working
Frontend: Shop modal opens and displays all items with correct prices
Frontend: Game navigation (quit to menu) working
Backend-Frontend integration: All API calls successful
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay CSS z-index/pointer-events issues. The .modal-overlay div is still intercepting clicks on modal content. Previous fix attempt was incomplete.
